reference: Hello, I am concerned that I may have obsessive-compulsive disorder or another obsessive disorder. I have a need to clean and to have a clean house all the time. Everything in my house has to have a specific spot, and if something is misplaced, I get really anxious and have to put it back in the correct spot immediately. My house is always clean and spotless. I get anxious a lot and randomly start moving things around.
text: Hello, I am concerned that I may have obsessive compulsive disorder or another obsessive disorder. I have a need to clean and to have a clean house all the time. Everything in my house has to have a specific spot, and if something is misplaced, I get really anxious and have to put it back in the correct spot immediately. My house is always clean and spotless. I get anxious a lot and randomly start moving things around.
